summary: Completed comprehensive testing of Nova Admin Dashboard feature. All 18 backend API tests passed (100%). Frontend tests passed for login, dashboard tabs (visitors, portfolio, contacts), CRUD operations, and logout. Homepage visitor tracking and portfolio section from API verified working.
passed_tests: POST /api/auth/login with correct credentials returns token
Admin login page at /admin renders correctly with form elements
Login with wrong credentials shows Arabic error message
Login with correct credentials redirects to /admin/dashboard
Dashboard displays visitors tab with stats cards and table
Dashboard portfolio tab displays projects with add/edit/delete
Dashboard portfolio add project form works
Dashboard contacts tab displays contact messages
Homepage loads and tracks visitors automatically
Homepage portfolio section loads projects from API
seed_data_creation: Cleaned up TEST_ prefixed projects after testing
context_for_next_testing_agent: Admin dashboard fully functional. Backend tests in /app/backend/tests/test_admin_dashboard.py cover auth, visitor tracking, portfolio CRUD, contacts. JWT tokens required for all /api/admin/* endpoints. Default portfolio projects returned when DB is empty.
